summary: Comprehensive testing of Streak, Games, and Multi-Language features. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: User testlearn@test.com has streak data (current_streak=1) and game scores for all 4 games (memory-match: 850, breathing-bubble: 420, color-harmony: 380, mindful-pattern: 550)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streak, Games, and Language features fully tested. Streak auto check-in works on Dashboard and Games page load. All 4 games (Memory Match, Breathing Bubble, Color Harmony, Pattern Recall) work correctly with score tracking. Language selector works on both landing page (data-testid='landing-lang-btn') and navigation bar (data-testid='nav-lang-btn'). Language preference persists in localStorage key 'cc_lang'. Games link available in navigation More dropdown.

streak_backend.post_streak_checkin_first: POST /api/streak/checkin creates streak record and returns current_streak=1 for first check-in
streak_backend.post_streak_checkin_same_day: POST /api/streak/checkin with same-day second call returns checked_in=false
streak_backend.get_streak: GET /api/streak returns streak data (current_streak, longest_streak, total_active_days)
streak_backend.auth_required: Streak endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)

games_backend.post_games_score: POST /api/games/score saves score and returns best_score and total_plays
games_backend.post_games_score_higher: POST /api/games/score with higher score updates best_score
games_backend.get_games_scores: GET /api/games/scores returns aggregated scores per game
games_backend.auth_required: Game score endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
games_backend.all_game_types: Scores saved successfully for all 4 game types (memory-match, breathing-bubble, color-harmony, mindful-pattern)

dashboard_integration.streak_card: Dashboard shows Streak card with current streak count (1 best | 1 total)
dashboard_integration.games_card: Dashboard shows Games card with 'Play Now' link to /games

games_page_ui.page_loads: Games page (/games) loads successfully with 'Wellness Games' header
games_page_ui.four_game_cards: 4 game cards displayed: Sacred Symbols (Memory Match), Breath of Life (Breathing Bubble), Color Harmony, Inner Rhythm (Pattern Recall)
games_page_ui.benefit_badges: Each game card shows benefit badge: Enhances Memory, Deep Relaxation, Uplifts Mood, Reduces Stress
games_page_ui.score_tracking: Game cards show best score and play count (e.g., 'Best: 850 | 3x played')

memory_match_game.opens_correctly: Clicking Memory Match card opens the game
memory_match_game.game_controls: Reset button and move counter visible

language_selector_landing.button_visible: Language selector button (Globe icon + EN) visible on landing page
language_selector_landing.dropdown_shows_6_languages: Dropdown shows 6 languages (EN, ES, FR, HI, JA, PT)
language_selector_landing.switching_to_spanish: Switching to Spanish changes landing page text to Spanish (El Cosmico Colectivo)
language_selector_landing.localStorage_persistence: Language preference stored in localStorage key 'cc_lang'

language_selector_nav.button_visible: Language selector button visible in navigation bar for logged-in users
language_selector_nav.switching_works: Switching languages updates the UI and persists to localStorage

games_in_nav.more_dropdown: Games link appears in navigation More dropdown
games_in_nav.navigation_works: Clicking Games in More dropdown navigates to /games

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/streak/checkin - 200 with auth (creates/updates streak), 401 without auth
GET /api/streak - 200 with auth (returns streak data), 401 without auth
POST /api/games/score - 200 with valid data (saves score, returns best_score/total_plays), 400 without game_id, 401 without auth
GET /api/games/scores - 200 with auth (returns aggregated scores per game), 401 without auth
frontend_ui_tested: Landing page language selector shows 6 languages and switches text correctly
Navigation bar language selector works for logged-in users
Games link in navigation More dropdown navigates to /games
Dashboard shows Streak card with current streak count
Dashboard shows Games card with 'Play Now' link
Games page shows 4 game cards with correct titles and benefit badges
Memory Match game opens with 16-card 4x4 grid
Game score tracking displays best score and play count
